name: Thin Mint Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the crust by crushing Thin Mint cookies and pressing them into a 9-inch Springform pan.
2. First Layer: Beat cream cheese until smooth, then add sugar and mix well. Add melted chocolate chips, crushed Thin Mints, eggs, and vanilla. Pour into prepared pan and place in freezer to firm up.
3. Second Layer: Beat cream cheese until smooth. Add sugar, chocolate chips, sour cream, eggs, vanilla, and peppermint extract. Mix until smooth.
4. Remove the first layer from the freezer and spread the second layer filling over it. Place the entire pan back in the freezer.
5. Bake at 325°F (163°C) for 1-1/2 hours, or until the top feels jiggly but firm.
6. Remove from oven and let cool completely. Refrigerate before serving.
7. For topping, melt chocolate chips and whisk in whipping cream and peppermint extract. Spread over the cooled cake and decorate with crushed Thin Mints. Accent with green icing around the cookies if desired. Keep chilled.
